name: Eddie Cochran
abstract: Edward Ray Cochran ( KOK-rən; October 3, 1938 – April 17, 1960) was an American rock and roll musician. His songs, such as "Twenty Flight Rock", "Summertime Blues", "C'mon Everybody" and "Somethin' Else", captured teenage frustration and desire in the mid-1950s and early 1960s.

about_quotes.speaker: James Hunter
about_quotes.evidence: Well when I was a teenager it was I think Eddie Cochran and Gene Vincent I got into.
about_quotes.doc_title: James Hunter interviewed by Monk Rowe, Boston, Massachusetts, July 25, 2018
